content.en:
Ye Tian has not taken the initiative to challenge others, but has been watching.

And after the battle just now, few people were willing to challenge him, because with the strength shown by Ye Tian, he was indeed qualified to rank 88th, and it was no good for others to succeed in challenging him.

And one person can only challenge ten times, so every opportunity to challenge cannot choose an opponent randomly.

At this moment, Ye Tian noticed that the two mysterious holy sons of the battle gate were challenged.

These two mysterious sons were also the first in the group, one was ranked 99th and the other was ranked 77th.

Among them, the 99th-ranked Yang Xi Holy Son began to challenge.

At this time, he showed very strong strength, directly challenged a genius in the 25th place, and defeated the opponent in a short time.

The 77th-ranked Starlight Son is also a genius who directly challenged the 22nd, and he also defeated the opponent in a short time.

Judging from the strength displayed by these two Holy Sons, they both possess the top two Transcendent combat power.

As the hidden Holy Son made a move, those geniuses who were in the top twenty were defeated one by one, ranking behind, and even the Star Feather Holy Son soon fell out of the ninth, constantly falling to the back ranking.

"Where did so many demons come from?"

Kamigawa Seiko was very annoyed.

Originally, he was ranked thirty-third, but now he has fallen out of the top 50, and he looked at Ye Tian's ranking, and he has fallen out of the top 100!

Once you beat the person in front of you, the defeated person will only be lowered by one place, which is the rule of the game.

Instead of 100 beating 60, 60 becomes 100, there is no such thing, it's just that 60 becomes 61.

Because of this, Kamigawa Seiko did not challenge others, and his ranking would continue to fall, unless he challenged those in front of him.

But he's not sure!

Therefore, he continued to watch the battle, and when the ranking was almost stable, he would challenge the weaker ones in front of him.

The same is true for Ye Tian, he is not in a hurry to challenge.

As time passed, a demon with a hidden name broke out, they had endured it for countless years, and now they naturally had to behave well, if they endured it any longer, they couldn't help it.

At this time, a battle attracted the attention of many people.

The first-ranked Yongyuan Holy Son, from the Immortal Holy Gate, is known as the first Holy Son of this era, his talent is very high, and he has been famous in the Dark Sacred Domain for a long time, if it weren't for this holy war, he would have already hit the Domain Ancestor Realm.

But now, someone has challenged him!

"It's the Zilin Holy Son of the Forbidden Holy Gate, and he dares to challenge the Yongyuan Holy Son?"

Many were shocked.

What a demon the Yongyuan Holy Son is, the inheritor of the Extreme Dao, the consummation of the Holy Body, the consummation of the Six Domains, and the incomparably deep foundation, it can be seen how demonic his strength is, and his combat power is infinitely close to the combat power of the Triple Overlimiter.

Everyone thought that the Yongyuan Holy Son would be able to easily defeat the Zilin Holy Son, but soon they were dumbfounded.

Abrupt.

The Purple Lin Holy Son turned into a humanoid giant beast, and his scales were extremely dazzling.

At the same time, he urged a holy body of the Perfection Realm, and grabbed the Yongyuan Holy Son with another claw.

This claw contains infinite mysteries, far beyond the domain arts!

"It's a holy technique! a purple gold claw holy technique from the Forbidden Holy Gate, and it's also a holy skill of the Dacheng realm!"

An Invincible Domain Ancestor shouted in shock.

The Holy Skill has appeared!

This is an exaggeration!

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors have not been able to practice a holy technique in their lifetime, and even some Invincible Domain Ancestors have practiced a holy technique, but they have only cultivated the holy technique to the entry level and the Xiaocheng realm.

However, the Zilin Holy Son had cultivated a holy technique to the Dacheng realm, and he was only a half-step domain ancestor in the One Realm.

What does this mean?

"The heirs of the two Supreme Domain Ancestors!"

Many speculate.

"It's the descendants of the two of the Forbidden Holy Gate, I didn't expect the two of them to give birth to another heir, and they are all Holy Endowers, good luck!"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor recognized the identity of the Zilin Holy Son.

In fact, the Supreme Domain Ancestors present all recognized the identity of the Zilin Holy Son, but they did not say it.

------------------

"Holy Technique!"

Yongyuan Holy Son was stunned.

He cultivated the Six Domains Technique to the consummation realm, but at most it was comparable to an entry-level holy skill, how could it be compared to a Dacheng-level holy skill?

The Zilin Holy Son was similar to him in other aspects, competing with the power of domain techniques and holy techniques.

Therefore, he couldn't stop it!

Rumble!!!!

The Yongyuan Holy Son was blown up, and the explosion here will not judge the loss, but once it is blown up many times, it will be judged to admit defeat.

Thundered!!!

The Yongyuan Holy Son tried his best to resist, but the gap was too big to defeat at all, and he was quickly defeated.

It's simply powerless!

The first Saint-giver appeared, and the winner appeared.

Originally, some people thought that the Yongyuan Holy Son would always hope to win the championship, but now they have shut up.

Soon, another person challenged the Eternal Yuan Holy Son, and it was the Flying Holy Son from the Dark Holy Gate!

The Yongyuan Holy Son was very angry at this time and wanted to defeat the Feiyang Holy Son and prove his strength.

But soon, he was beaten again.

Because the Flying Saint Son is also a Holy Gift, he has a Holy Gift, and he has also cultivated to the Dacheng realm, although it is not an attack-type Holy Gift, but only a speed-type Holy Gift.

But after cultivating the speed type of holy skills, the speed of the Flying Saint Son was too terrifying, and the Yongyuan Saint Son couldn't beat the Flying Saint Son at all, so he was quickly defeated by the other party.

Ye Tian has been paying attention to the light-clothed saintess of the Holy Maiden Sect, the other party seems to be very forbearing, ranking second in the group stage, and now in the third round, he still hasn't challenged anyone.

If it weren't for Ye Tian finding out about her talent, he would really think that this was a very ordinary genius.

It didn't take long for the light-clothed saintess to finally challenge.

Moreover, as soon as she challenged, she directly challenged the Son of Yongyuan!

"What, you, a saint of about 200, dare to challenge me?"

The Holy Son of Yongyuan was furious.

He is also a genius of the era, and now everyone treats him as a soft persimmon?

Before the Light-Clad Saintess, there had already been five Saint-endowed ones who had come to challenge him, and he didn't believe that the Light-Cloaked Saint-Woman was also a Saint-Gifted.

Two took the stage.

The Yongyuan Holy Son was about to make a move, but he was pierced through the head by a sword, and his body collapsed instantly, and he did not heal again.

This sword directly killed him in seconds!

Outside the ring.

Yongyuan Shengzi's mentality completely collapsed, and he was killed by a woman in seconds!
